title: lithocarpus dalatensis
intro: Lithocarpus dalatensis, also known as Dalat stone oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Lithocarpus dalatensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus dalatensis include tea and decoctions, which can be made by infusing the leaves and bark in hot water.
